name: rails-rollbar-replace
given: A Rails 8 application with Rollbar already configured for error monitoring
prompt: Replace Rollbar with Sentry in this Rails application. Set up full Sentry monitoring including error tracking, tracing, and logging. Remove the Rollbar gem and configuration. Use the SENTRY_DSN environment variable.

soft_assertions.criterion: The agent replaced Rollbar.error/warning/info calls with Sentry equivalents like Sentry.capture_exception or Sentry.capture_message
